news.headline: Bitcoin 'wholecoiners' have held above 1 million for 13 months, despite market fluctuations.
news.summary: The count of individuals holding one whole Bitcoin, known as wholecoiners, fluctuates in tandem with the ups and downs of the cryptocurrency market. However, this number has remained consistent at over 1 million for more than a year.

news.headline: CCC Intelligent Solutions prices secondary offering of 30 million shares of common stock by Advent International and Oak Hill Capital Partners.
news.summary: In Chicago, CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: CCCS) revealed the pricing of a secondary stock offering by affiliates of Advent International, L.P. and Oak Hill Capital Partners. The offering involves 30 million shares of the Company's common stock, to be sold through negotiated transactions.

news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. acquired 1,500,000 common shares and 1,000,000 warrants of Quebec Innovative Materials Corp., increasing ownership above 10% on a partially diluted basis.
news.summary: In Toronto on June 27, 2024, ThreeD Capital Inc., a Canadian venture capital firm trading on the CSE under IDK and OTCQX as IDKFF, made an announcement regarding its recent acquisitions. Through a private placement and securities purchased on the Canadian Securities Exchange, ThreeD in partnership with Sheldon Inwentash obtained ownership of 1,500,000 common shares and 1,000,000 common share purchase warrants of Quebec Innovative Materials Corp. This acquisition resulted in ThreeD and the Joint Actor holding a stake of over 10% on a partially diluted basis in the Company.

news.headline: Japanese yen falls but recovers slightly as Mimura takes over as head of Japan's foreign exchange market.
Potential Solana ETF might be on the horizon with a new SEC head, as per analysts.
news.summary: According to two industry experts, to consider the establishment of a Solana Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF), it is crucial to have a new Chair for the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).

news.headline: AI in the workplace can lead to loneliness among workers, impacting productivity. Harvard Business Review warns about the downside of efficiency.
news.summary: According to the Harvard Business Review, introducing AI to improve office efficiency may not always lead to happier employees.

news.headline: India Bonds now included in JPMorgan Index, could attract billions in investments, boosting economy.
Trump-Biden debate: US presidential candidates clash in CNN faceoff. Watch live on Bloomberg.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 100,000 new jobs were added to the economy last month, exceeding expectations. The unemployment rate dropped to 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. Additionally, the stock market surged with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,200. Experts predict continued growth in the upcoming months as the economy shows signs of recovery from the pandemic.

news.headline: HKMA & SFC update Financial Services Providers list for OTC derivatives with annual review. (Source: undisclosed)
news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) and the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) have completed their yearly review of the Financial Services Providers list in compliance with the OTC derivatives regulatory framework. This update includes relevant information on approved institutions in the financial services sector. For more details, kindly refer to the official announcement.

news.headline: Australia's actual housing credit increased by 0.4%, matching a previous rate of 0.4%, with no forecasted change.
USD strengthens against key currencies; BBDXY index up by 0.2%.
Private sector credit in Australia rises by 0.4%, lower than the estimated 0.5% and the previous 0.5%.
Topix Stock Index in Japan close to reaching record high set in 1990.
CEMATRIX raises Credit Facility to $8 million with Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce, up from $3 million.
news.summary: CEMATRIX Corporation, a prominent North American producer and supplier of innovative cellular concrete products, has revealed their successful expansion of the credit facility with the Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce. The purpose is to aid the company's continuous expansion and handle short-term working capital needs during peak times. The credit facility limit has surged to $8 million, a substantial rise from the previous limit of $3 million, while the other conditions of the facility remain mostly unaltered. As of now, the credit remains untapped.

news.headline: PBOC sells CNY 50B in 7-day reverse repo at 1.8% rate.
Chinese offshore yuan slightly gains after PBOC's strengthened fixing.
Nexalin Technology prices public offering at $1.75 per share, raising $5.2 million in gross proceeds.
news.summary: In Houston, Texas on June 27, 2024, Nexalin Technology, Inc. revealed the pricing details of their public offering. The company, listed as Nexalin (Nasdaq: NXL; NXLIW), declared that 3,000,000 common shares are being offered at $1.75 per share. The total gross proceeds from this offering are estimated to reach around $5,250,000, prior to deductions for placement agent fees and additional offering costs.

news.headline: China's yuan fixed at 7.2685 per dollar according to recent survey data.
Yuan's fixed at 7.2669-7.2696 range in China survey.
Tariffs proposed to cut deficits as Trump targets China, calls for closer scrutiny of trade partners.
Trump addresses viewers during CNN's US Presidential debate.
Biden plans to lower housing costs, boost construction, and cap rent prices to help more people afford homes.
2020 candidate Joe Biden discusses policies at televised presidential debate on CNN.
Debate between Biden and Trump starts on CNN, watched by millions.
Baupost reduces 20% of investing team in largest staff cut to date.
Tokyo's inflation speeds up, likely leading to BOJ rate hike.
NC is key battleground in U.S. election, says Wiley. #WhiteHouseRace #Bloomberg
Recent polls indicate that Biden and Trump are neck and neck, gearing up for a close debate. #ElectionCountdown
USD gains against yen, reaching 1 USD to 161 yen.
Yen declines after slight rise earlier.
VFLY introduces VFLY C1 Disposable Vape with real-time visual experience and smart HD screen. (Characters: 88)
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Shenzhen, China, VFLY, a prominent company in the vaping sector and a subsidiary of SKE, revealed the debut of its inaugural product, the VFLY C1 Disposable Vape. This revolutionary product features cutting-edge design and includes a smart HD screen, setting it apart in the market.

news.headline: Salesforce declares quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, payable on July 25, 2024, to stockholders of record on July 9.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the leading AI CRM company, has revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share. This dividend, declared by the board of directors, will be paid on July 25, 2024, to stockholders recorded on July 9, 2024. Salesforce, known for its top AI CRM platform, enables businesses to engage with customers in innovative ways through CRM, AI, data, and trust on the integrated Einstein 1 platform. Visit www.salesforce.com for further details.

news.headline: Global Synthetic Yarn Market to hit $300.5 billion by 2029 at 5.1% CAGR, driven by fast fashion trend & eco-friendly demand. Asia Pacific leads with the largest share. Key players include Kuraray, Teijin, DuPont. Key findings: Polyester fiber type dominates, apparels/home furnishing main end-use industries.
news.summary: The Global Synthetic Yarn Market is projected to grow from USD 234.1 billion in 2024 to USD 300.5 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 5.1%. The demand is increasing from the apparel & furnishing industry due to urban population growth. Key players include Kuraray, Teijin, DuPont, and others. The largest market share in 2023 was held by filament yarn type and polyester fiber type. Asia Pacific accounted for the largest share in 2023. Drivers include the demand for fast fashion, while challenges include environmental regulations. Apparel & home furnishings are expected to remain the largest end-use industries.

news.headline: Fed Gov. Cook suggests lowering interest rates, currently at 5.25% to 5.50%, with inflation at 3.4%. Timing depends on economic data and outlook.
news.summary: Lisa Cook, a Federal Reserve Governor, suggests a decrease in the Fed's interest rate, although she has not specified the ideal timing for this adjustment. The Fed has maintained its federal funds rate between 5.25% and 5.50% following the recent meeting, aligning with its objective of lowering the inflation rate to 2%. Currently, inflation stands at 3.4% as reported by the Bureau of Labor Statistics. Cook, speaking at the Economic Club of New York, emphasized the importance of easing policy restrictions to ensure a balanced economy given the improvement in inflation and gradual labor market cooling. She highlighted that the timing of any rate adjustment will rely on the evolving economic data and its implications on the economic outlook and risk balance.

news.headline: "LandBridge prices IPO at $17/share with 14.5M Class A shares; underwriters have option for 2.175M more shares."
news.summary: In Houston, LandBridge Company LLC has successfully priced its initial public offering of 14,500,000 Class A shares at $17.00 each. The total amount raised from this offering is $246,500,000. The underwriters have been granted a 30-day option to purchase an additional 2,175,000 Class A shares. Once trading begins, these shares are set to trade on the stock market.

news.headline: CFIUS approves merger of North American Stainless & Haynes International; deal involves high-performance alloys.
news.summary: In Kokomo, Indiana, on June 27, 2024, Haynes International, Inc. (NASDAQ GM: HAYN) disclosed that they have received approval from the Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS) for their intended merger with North American Stainless, Inc. Haynes International is known for its expertise in producing high-performance alloys. This milestone signifies a crucial step towards the completion of the merger, solidifying the company's position in the industry.

news.headline: SK hynix unveils PCB01 for AI PCs, 5th gen 8-channel PCIe, mass production this year, industry's top SSD.
news.summary: PCB01, the latest 8-channel PCIe 5th generation, is in development and slated for mass production later this year. This cutting-edge SSD technology is set to become the industry's top choice for PC users, boasting optimization for on-device AI applications. Additionally, there has been significant progress in enhancing NAND solutions that will build on the success of HBM technology. These advancements aim to strengthen the company's position as a leader in the AI memory sector. This development is coming out of SEOUL, South Korea.

news.headline: dynaCERT reports results from shareholders meeting: 114.5M shares represented, 27.5% of total shares outstanding.
news.summary: TORONTO--dynaCERT Inc. reported the outcomes of its annual and special shareholder meeting held in Toronto, Ontario. A total of 114,544,944 common shares, equivalent to 27.501% of all outstanding Common Shares, were present at the meeting. The event took place at Alliance Banquet Hall, 501 Alliance Avenue. The Company's ticker symbols are TSX: DYA, OTC: DYFSF, and FRA: DMJ.

news.headline: American offices are experiencing massive vacancies due to ongoing trends.
Australia records A$18.2B surplus for 2023-24 fiscal year.
Innovent Biologics provides updates on clinical data from study, Mazdutide GLORY-1 along with general biomedicine pipeline progress.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Innovent Biologics, Inc. (Innovent), headquartered in San Francisco and Suzhou, China, shared news via PRNewswire. Innovent, listed on HKEX as 01801, is a prominent biopharmaceutical company focused on developing, manufacturing, and distributing top-tier medications for oncology, cardiovascular, and metabolic conditions.

news.headline: Meta Platforms surged, software stocks led. Biden-Trump debate and Fed inflation gauge ahead. Dow Jones futures waver.
news.summary: On Thursday, Meta Platforms experienced a significant rise in stock value, while software stocks continued to lead the market, building on a strong recovery seen in June. Investors are keeping an eye on the upcoming debate between President Biden and former President Trump, as well as the Federal Reserve's inflation gauge. The Dow Jones Futures witnessed a decline in a major stock, amid the anticipation surrounding these key events. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: California sees sharp increase in workers’ comp med-legal costs under new fee schedule, with average payment for comprehensive exam up 52%.
news.summary: In Oakland, California, a recent study by CWCI revealed a notable increase in payments for medical-legal evaluations and reports following the implementation of a new Med-Legal Fee Schedule in April 2021. The average payment for a comprehensive exam surged by 52%, surpassing initial expectations. This rise can be attributed to the introduction of new per-page fees for record review, in addition to the existing flat fees for med-legal evaluation services. Moreover, in 2023, there was a further 6% growth in these payments.

news.headline: Japan's industrial output rises by 2.8% in the latest month, beating forecasts of 2% and improving from -0.9% previously.
Japan's METI forecasts a 4.8% decline in June output compared to the previous month.
Japan's July output predicted to rise by 3.6% month-on-month by Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry.
Mogo had a successful AGM with all resolutions approved, including election of directors & appointment of auditors.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, the annual general meeting of shareholders of Mogo Inc. (NASDAQ: MOGO) (TSX: MOGO) was conducted today via a live audiocast online. Mogo, a digital wealth and payments company, confirmed the approval of all resolutions presented at the meeting. This includes the election of directors and the appointment of auditors for the company. The meeting covered various matters which were extensively discussed during the proceedings.

news.headline: LEQEMBI (Lecanemab) for Alzheimer's launched in China, following US and Japan. China is third country to launch the drug.
news.summary: China has become the third country to launch the LEQEMBI, following in the footsteps of the United States and Japan. This significant milestone showcases China's technological advancements and growing presence in the space industry. The LEQEMBI launch solidifies China's position as a key player in the global space race.

news.headline: Parent company of 'Elden Ring' faces ransomware attack as group "Black Suit" demands payment, threatening to expose stolen data.
news.summary: A group referred to as "Black Suit" has allegedly requested payment and is threatening to disclose stolen information if their demands are not met.

news.headline: Hyundai's robots can serve coffee and park cars, offering advanced tech solutions.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States saw a slight increase to 4.4% in the month of June, with a total of 7.14 million people currently unemployed. The job market added 850,000 new jobs last month, showing a positive trend in the economy's recovery from the effects of the pandemic. The labor force participation rate also went up to 61.7%, indicating more people are actively seeking employment opportunities. These numbers suggest a promising outlook for the country's economic growth in the coming months.
